blocks.text: Two teams, two 2-0 deficits — miracle night or early exits?
Anfield has conjured European miracles before — but Liverpool need two goals without reply against PSG. Barcelona's ask is even steeper: overturn a 2-0 deficit away at the Metropolitano.
🎮 IEM Rio 2026, ongoing — Norwegian legend rain hunting CS2 Major glory in Rio
